calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-08-2022 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:

Gennady Feldman Appellant/Defendant.
David Adams, Esq. on behalf of Respondent/Plaintiffs Evan Daniel Bachmann and Jennifer Drake

The matter originally was sent to Department 505 before Judge Harold Kahn on March 3, 2022. Mr. Adams, who did not file a substitution of attorney, submitted a Respondent's Trial Brief The Court GRANTED a continuance to April 5, 2022 at 9:00am per request of appellant Gennady Feldman, due to personal/famnily circumstances.

On April 1, 2022, the appellant Gennady Feldman filed a Small Claims Ex Parte Motion/ pplication For Continuance and Declaration to May 18th in the clerk's office in Room 103 in Dept 206.

On April 5, 2022, the above parties appeared. Appellant Gennady Feldman informs the Court that he filed an Abandonment of Appeal that morning in the clerk's office. Mr. Adams on behalf of Respondent/Plaintiffs Evan Daniel Bachmann and Jennifer Drake inform the Court that they oppose the Abandonment of Appeal. The Court reviews local rules and states they cannot object to the filing of the abandonment. Instead the Court will review the current documents and take the matter under submission. The Court considers the Respondent's Trial Brief as an exhibit.

Exhibit 1 - Respondent's Trial Brief

April 8, 2022, The Court modifies the original judgment.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: R. Gumpal, Not Reported, (505).

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-03-2022 Continued To Apr-05-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Evan Daniel Bachmann,Plaintiff/Respondents.
Jennifer Louise Drake, Plaintiff/Respondents.
David Adams, Esq. on behalf of Evan Daniel Bachmann and Jennifer Louise Drake Plaintiff/Respondents.
Gennady V. Feldman, Defendant/Appellant.

This case comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Mr. Feldman, Defendant/Appellant requests a continuance for the small claims appeal to family circumstances involving Ukraine. No objections from plaintiff/respondent's counsel. The Court grants Mr. Feldman's request and sets the new date to Tuesday, April 5, 2022 at 9am.

Mr. Adams, on behalf of Evan Daniel Bachmann and Jennifer Louise Drake Plaintiff/Respondents submits a Respondent's Trial Brief in open court.

No new exhibits are introduced.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: R. Gumpal, Not Reported, (505).

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Mar-03-2022 Set For Trial On Mar-03-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 505

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-02-2022 Continued To Mar-03-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
